subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness! Thou hast been remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and He maketh mention of thee at this moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س علیک بهاء الله و عنایته قد کنت مذکورا لدی المظلوم و یذکرک فیهذا الحین ان
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
